docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,795.00 FILED BY TORRANO & TORRANO GOLD CO. AS TO DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA TRAN DBA  JEWELRY BY ROSALINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRANO & TORRANO GOLD CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRANO & TORRANO GOLD CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA TRAN DBA  JEWELRY BY ROSALINA $2,795.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,955.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
